---
name: Research topic suggestion
about: Propose a new ZK or interop topic for the broadcast catalog
title: "[topic] "
labels: ["research", "topic-proposal"]
---

**Slug**

Short kebab-case identifier, e.g. `nova-folding`.

**Channel**

One of: zk, bridge, anchor, open-docs.

**Summary**

One or two sentences. What is the topic and why does it matter for ZK or
cross-chain interoperability research?

**References**

Links to papers, repos, or blog posts. The more primary the better.

**Difficulty (1-5)**

Rough audience difficulty.
